sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9440" key="a)ntanalamba/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντανα-λαμβάνω</orth>, <sense id="n9440.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">take over instead,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Phas.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.11H.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
